metadata.title: China to Europe 2026 - Scaling Beyond Borders | Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: A one-day exclusive event bringing together business leaders, investors, and experts to explore opportunities, navigate complexities, and scale your business from China to Europe.

hero.title: China to Europe 2026: Scaling Beyond Borders
hero.eventTitle: China to Europe 2026: Scaling Beyond Borders
hero.eventSubline: A one-day exclusive event bringing together business leaders, investors, and experts to explore opportunities, navigate complexities, and scale your business from China to Europe.

eventBackground.title: Why China to Europe?
paragraphs: As global supply chains evolve and new opportunities emerge, businesses are rethinking expansion. Europe offers stability, innovation, and access to a vast market.
This event is your roadmap to enter and scale successfully.

journey.title: Your Journey. Our Expertise.
journey.subtitle: From strategic planning to seamless setup and sustainable growth, we help you scale beyond borders with confidence.

cards.title: Strategy & Market Entry
cards.description: Market insights, opportunity assessment, and tailored entry strategies for long-term success.

cards.title: Build & Establish
cards.description: Entity setup, legal compliance, local partnerships, and operational infrastructure.

cards.title: Grow & Expand
cards.description: Scale operations, optimize processes, and unlock new opportunities across Europe.

items.title: Insightful Keynotes
items.description: Hear from industry leaders and visionaries.

items.title: Business Networking
items.description: Connect with decision makers and peers.

items.title: Exclusive Takeaways
items.description: Walk away with practical insights and resources.

footerCta.tag: Be part of the future of global business.
footerCta.title: Let's build your global success story together.
footerCta.description: Join us on May 15, 2026 in Shanghai for a day of insights, connections, and opportunities.
